entries.name: Herald
entries.definition: Divine messenger who announces celestial decrees and prophecies

entries.definition: Protector of sacred knowledge and divine boundaries

entries.name: Guide
entries.definition: Spiritual mentor who leads souls through mystical realms

entries.name: Judge
entries.definition: Arbiter of divine law and cosmic justice

entries.name: Alchemist
entries.definition: Master of divine transformation and spiritual refinement

entries.name: Artificer
entries.definition: Creator of sacred tools and mystical artifacts

entries.name: High Priestess
entries.definition: Channel of divine mysteries and sacred wisdom

entries.name: Mirror
entries.definition: Reflector of divine truth and self-knowledge

entries.name: Oracle
entries.definition: Channel of divine wisdom and prophetic insights

entries.name: Weaver
entries.definition: Creator of spiritual connections and divine patterns

entries.definition: Guardian of sacred beings and divine essence

entries.name: Master

entries.name: Harbinger
entries.definition: Announcer of significant spiritual changes

entries.name: Liberator
entries.definition: Breaker of spiritual bonds and limitations
